DatasetTitle: OCCUPATION BY COUNTRY OF BIRTH BY SEX
StatisticalPopulations: All usual residents aged 16 to 74 in employment
Annotations: 1. 'EU' is the European Union and is as defined on Census day (27 March 2011).; 2. 'Other' consists of persons born at sea or in the air, or with country of birth not stated.; 3. 'Member countries prior to 2004 expansion' includes United Kingdom (part not specified) and Ireland (part not specified).; 4. 'Accession countries 2004 onwards' includes Republic of Cyprus; Other includes Cyprus (not otherwise specified).; 5. 'In employment' includes economically active full-time students in employment.; 6. The occupation classification is based on the Standard Occupation Classification 2010 (SOC2010).
